overview: The Konted C10RL is a combination of two probes, one side of the convex array probe and the other side of the line array probe, and the convex array probe has a cardiac preset function.The Konted C10RL is a wireless ultrasound scanner with dual probe, 3 in 1 multipurpose handheld convex+linear+cardiac whole body ultrasound scan.

specs.label: Imaging Modes
specs.value: B, B+M, Color Doppler, PW, Power Doppler

specs.label: Applications
specs.value: Abdomen, OB/GYN, Cardiac, Vascular, Thyroid, Breast, MSK, Pediatrics, Urology

features: Handheld USB + Wi-Fi Color Doppler Ultrasound
Compatible with Android, iOS, and Windows
Supports measurements, report editing, and multi-language software
Portable for clinic, ER, ICU, OR, and bedside use
